turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f7f9"/>
  <!-- left person whispering -->
  <g transform="translate(120,260)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="70" ry="90" fill="#e6eaea"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-10" r="8" fill="#c4c6c6"/>
    <path d="M-5,15 C20,10 40,30 40,50 C10,60 -10,50 -5,15" fill="#dfe3e3"/>
    <path d="M-10,-20 C10,-30 40,-10 40,10" stroke="#bfc3c3" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M50,20 C70,5 80,15 75,35 C70,50 55,55 45,40 C35,30 40,25 50,20" fill="#e6eaea" stroke="#cfcfcf" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- right person listening (mirrored) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,260) scale(-1,1)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="70" ry="90" fill="#f0f2f3"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-10" r="8" fill="#c4c6c6"/>
    <path d="M-5,15 C20,10 40,30 40,50 C10,60 -10,50 -5,15" fill="#e9ecec"/>
    <path d="M70,-5 C78,0 78,20 70,30 C66,24 66,4 70,-5" fill="#dfe3e3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- faint whispered sound lines -->
  <g stroke="#9ea3a3" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6">
    <path d="M190,230 C240,210 280,210 310,230" stroke-dasharray="6 8" opacity="0.5"/>
    <path d="M195,250 C245,235 285,235 315,250" stroke-dasharray="4 10" opacity="0.35" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M200,270 C250,260 290,260 320,270" stroke-dasharray="2 12" opacity="0.2" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <ellipse cx="256" cy="320" rx="220" ry="100" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.03"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.content:
{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f7f7f9"/>
  <!-- left person whispering -->
  <g transform="translate(120,260)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="70" ry="90" fill="#e6eaea"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-10" r="8" fill="#c4c6c6"/>
    <path d="M-5,15 C20,10 40,30 40,50 C10,60 -10,50 -5,15" fill="#dfe3e3"/>
    <path d="M-10,-20 C10,-30 40,-10 40,10" stroke="#bfc3c3" stroke-width="6" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M50,20 C70,5 80,15 75,35 C70,50 55,55 45,40 C35,30 40,25 50,20" fill="#e6eaea" stroke="#cfcfcf" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- right person listening (mirrored) -->
  <g transform="translate(360,260) scale(-1,1)">
    <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="70" ry="90" fill="#f0f2f3"/>
    <circle cx="-20" cy="-10" r="8" fill="#c4c6c6"/>
    <path d="M-5,15 C20,10 40,30 40,50 C10,60 -10,50 -5,15" fill="#e9ecec"/>
    <path d="M70,-5 C78,0 78,20 70,30 C66,24 66,4 70,-5" fill="#dfe3e3"/>
  </g>

  <!-- faint whispered sound lines -->
  <g stroke="#9ea3a3" stroke-width="3" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.6">
    <path d="M190,230 C240,210 280,210 310,230" stroke-dasharray="6 8" opacity="0.5"/>
    <path d="M195,250 C245,235 285,235 315,250" stroke-dasharray="4 10" opacity="0.35" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M200,270 C250,260 290,260 320,270" stroke-dasharray="2 12" opacity="0.2" stroke-width="2"/>
  </g>

  <ellipse cx="256" cy="320" rx="220" ry="100" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.03"/>
</svg>"
}
message.reasoning:
**Simplifying SVG design**

I need to create a visual where the left speaker head is on the left, facing right, while the right listener head is on the right, facing left, with an ear highlighted. I'll use overlapping circles for faces and smaller ear shapes. For whisper lines, I plan to use three thin, curved strokes with low opacity and a dashed stroke to suggest whispering. It's important to keep the colors muted and stroke widths thin. I also need to ensure the SVG string is correctly formatted for JSON, with internal quotes escaped.**Creating SVG content**

I'm working on crafting some SVG content, starting with a simple layout. The SVG has a width and height of 512 and includes a background rectangle. messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }
